item.summary: Products were made with recalled California Dairies milk powder due to Salmonella. Product details: White Cheddar Seasoning packed in the following sizes and configurations: 1. Net Wt. 1.2 oz (34g) Distributed by: Fireworks Popcorn, Division of Jonco Industries, Milwaukee, WI 53218. Sold in a Fireworks Popcorn, Natural American Popcorn Popping & Toppings gif...
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
